caption: The video appears to be an educational presentation discussing "Common Sense Interventions" and how behavior is influenced by descriptive norms. The slide shown features an image of the entrance sign for Petrified Forest National Park, along with a sign that reads, "Your heritage is being vandalized every day by theft losses of petrified wood of 14 tons a year, mostly a small piece at a time." This suggests that the video is likely addressing issues related to conservation and the impact of human behavior on natural resources. The presenter may be using this example to illustrate how highlighting negative behaviors can inadvertently encourage more of the same, emphasizing the importance of carefully crafting messages to promote positive actions.
